query: EHR-rich oncology datasets with co-measured somatic mutations + clinical/EHR-like metadata, usable as agnostic covariate source for mutational-signature aetiology association

adapter_search.note: BPC / MSK-CHORD live on Synapse behind DUAs and are not indexed by the zenodo/GEO/etc. adapters; ranking is LLM-knowledge-driven and cross-referenced against existing doc/datasets notes.

selection_criteria: co-measured somatic mutations (so signature exposures H derivable)
per-sample signature feasibility prefers WES/WGS; panels => cohort-pooled/refit only (q018)
rich clinical / EHR-like metadata (treatment, ICD-O/ICD-10, histology, outcomes, vital status)

candidates.name: AACR GENIE BPC (Biopharma Collaborative, PRISSMM)
candidates.verdict: best EHR-covariate source; panel caps to cohort-level signatures

candidates.name: TCGA MC3 unified MAF
candidates.signature_grade: per-sample de-novo OK (2.9M PASS / 9,104 samples / 32 types)
candidates.verdict: signature engine for h08; already ingested as pseudo-study tcga_mc3

candidates.name: TCGA PanCanAtlas
candidates.verdict: co-expression covariate source; pairs with MC3 for signature-grade track

candidates.name: MSK-CHORD
candidates.verdict: secondary EHR-covariate candidate; verify NLP field + license terms

candidates.name: AACR GENIE (main registry)
candidates.ehr_richness: thin (OncoTree, age, sex, sample type; no treatment/outcome)
candidates.verdict: covariate-thin; main value is panel-coverage BEDs already used

candidates.name: METABRIC
candidates.ehr_richness: co-measured microarray expression + clinical + long survival (breast)

candidates.name: PCAWG
candidates.verdict: signature-ideal but covariate-poor; reference for spectra not association

two_track_plan.signature_grade_track: tcga-mc3 (per-sample de-novo) x tcga-pancanatlas expression + structured clinical -> H08a positive control + H08b expression discovery
two_track_plan.ehr_covariate_track: aacr-genie-bpc / msk-chord (cohort-pooled signatures) x rich EHR terms -> tests whether EHR covariates add aetiology signal beyond structured fields

data_gaps: free-text symptom/bigram data is not public (IRB-gated); coded ICD-O + regimen vocabularies in BPC/CHORD are the realistic stand-in
SV/CNV signatures (PCAWG) out of scope: CNV not ingested (blocked t055)
MSK-CHORD NLP field availability + license terms unverified
BPC top-level Synapse accession + per-cohort signature-usable variant availability unverified
